# KBE Motorsport

KBE Motorsport is a European automotive specialist shop in the Pocono Mountains, Pennsylvania, founded by Konrad Bzura. The shop specializes in complex, master-level repairs on Mercedes-Benz and European vehicles — no shortcuts.

## Services
- Engine rebuilds and service (M104, M119, OM606)
- Transmission service and rebuild (722.6)
- Timing chain replacement
- Electrical diagnosis and wiring repair
- Suspension and brake service
- Compression testing and diagnostics

## Vehicle Specialties
- Mercedes-Benz W124, W140, W220, W211, W163
- European makes: BMW, Audi, Volkswagen

## Location
Pocono Mountains, Pennsylvania, USA
